name: waiting-for-passcode
note: Line 4 is the real assisted-model prompt '*** Waiting for passcode to be entered on the device ***' (D13). The stall after it models the user taking time to enter the passcode on the phone; the engine must PAUSE the liveness clock in the waiting_for_passcode phase, so this silence — with no tree churn — must NOT trip the stall timeout. Then progress resumes to success.
